title: HalbCraft - Extra Items
description:
A growing collection of custom items!
As fun and minecrafty as possible!
body:
# HalbCraft - Extra Items!
New fun items on every tuesday for 2025!

Items Added:
### Wind Staff:
> Dropped from the Breeze! When clicking, you will launch yourself forth riding on a wind charge that quickly descends! The staff can be repaired with wind charges on an anvil!

### Void Bundles:
> Catches ANY Projectile and keeps EVERY bit of Data on it! Can be released at any time to send your friends into a lava pit with their own ender pearls!
Crafted with an Eye Of Ender and a Bundle
Catches all projectiles from mobs as well!

> Void Bundles Can now be used with Dispensers! Shoot personalized Ender Pearls and Shulker bullets!

### Totem of Dying:
> Protects from death, but also kills the attacker!
Dropped from Evokers in the Nether

### Totem of Avoiding
> Players falling in the End's void will descend to the overworld
Dropped from Evokers in the End

### Baby Carrots
> Shrinks the player down to half their size with half their max health until they eat a regular carrot again. Dropped by Baby Zombies or from regular carrot crop blocks.

### Spewing Dragon head!
> Crafted using a dragon head and a flint and steal. Right-click with a firework star in the off-hand to summon a projectile that spawns fireworks matching to the firework star!

### Golden Chorus Fruit
> Can be eaten quicker and teleports further than a regular chorus fruit. Crafted with gold nuggets surrounding a chorus fruit. 

### Glowing Berries
> Grants a glowing and night vision effect combo for a minute. Crafted by combining glowstone dust and glow berries.
